name: iProov
description: iProov provides biometric face verification and Genuine Presence Assurance technology with patented Flashmark liveness, delivered as APIs and SDKs for governments, banks and enterprises.

seo.title: iProov — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: iProov: iProov provides biometric face verification and Genuine Presence Assurance technology with patented Flashmark liveness, delivered as APIs and SDKs for g

when_to_use: Genuine Presence Assurance liveness for government eID
Flashmark biometric authentication for bank re-verification
Anti-deepfake face verification for regulated KYC onboarding
Biometric authentication SDK for FIDO2-compliant apps
Workforce authentication with iProov for privileged access

pros: Genuine Presence Assurance used by governments
Web-based, no mobile SDK integration required
cons: Flash-based UX confuses some end users
Face verification only, no document stack
Works best in controlled lighting conditions
review.verdict: Top-tier face liveness when deepfake defense matters most; you still need a KYC stack around it.
review.best_for: Governments and banks needing state-of-the-art face liveness against sophisticated deepfake attacks
review.not_for: Teams wanting one vendor for documents, screening and biometrics without stitching components
